descriptions: Coin count differs significantly
Level progression numbers and final level differ
The level progress and current active level don't match the reference state.
Game board size and position differs
Marble board is flat/front-facing instead of shown at a 3D perspective tilt

The main game board in the center is rotated in the reference to create a dynamic/tilted visual, but in ours it is completely upright, and its layer ordering with the vertical progression line is completely wrong (the line overlapping the board).
Additional UI elements at top of screen
Extra decorative confetti/particle elements scattered around the board
Device status bar (time and battery status) is visible on our screen but absent in the reference.
Game board position and marble arrangement is completely different
Fewer marbles are placed on the board compared to reference; board is far less filled
The game board state (positions and colors of the balls and shooters) is completely different.
Coin count value is different
Coin count value differs from reference
The coin count value in the bottom left button is incorrect.
Status bar elements appear in top corners
Status bar elements (time, battery, signal) are visible at the top of the screen in our version but hidden in the reference.
Header banner extends to screen edges
Content is zoomed/cropped so the modal overflows the visible viewport, cutting off the background pattern, badge icon at bottom, and status bar overlaps the header
The top of the settings popup container is cut off/zoomed in, pushing the 'SETTINGS' text and the 'X' close button off the top edge of the safe area.
Status bar information appears at top of screen
System status bar icons (time, battery, etc.) are visible over the game interface in our version.
Gold gear/wheel element missing from bottom
Purple background pattern with faint circular decorations and badge icon at bottom are not visible
Coins/currency counter missing from top
Coin balance indicator (75) missing from top right
The top-right corner coin balance progress/display bar is completely missing.
Status bar elements added
Extra falling coin icons scattered around the card that aren't in reference
An extra 'Replay' text button is rendered at the bottom edge of the white modal, which is not present in the design.
Next button position changed
Card is not vertically centered and overflows off-screen at bottom, cutting off content
The main 'Next' action button is placed inside the reward modal card overlaying other elements, rather than outside and below it dynamically as a primary standalone button.
Reward amount presentation differs
'LEVEL 4' label missing above COMPLETED banner
The 'REWARD' header label above the reward amount is missing.
Crying emoji is missing
Missing the level number text, background wood panel, sad emoji face, and 'No hearts left' message
The sad emoji illustration in the center of the card is entirely missing in our version.
Main message text is different
Different body message text
The 'LEVEL 4' label above 'FAILED' is missing, and the main card body text is completely different.
Button arrangement is different
Overall composition is much smaller and centered differently, missing decorative background elements and vertical spacing
The action buttons at the bottom of the card are completely reshuffled, and their visual styles do not match.
Quit option added
Extra 'Quit' text link not present in reference
Retry text styling differs significantly
Font families and weights differ throughout the card.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 60% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
